as_of_alignment: The window ending at date t regresses r_{t-60+1}..r_t on the same-window factor returns; betas, residuals, and diagnostics at t use data <= t only. Consumers must not execute before t+1.
note: OLS-with-intercept residuals sum to zero in-window, so the cumulative residual X returns to ~0 at the window's right edge; QR4.4 builds the s-score from the OU fit of the X path, not the endpoint level.
